_comment: Copy to scaffold.config.json and fill in real values. Run via: claude /scaffold-site (recommended) — Claude Code generates the 50 articles via Write tool. Or run `node scripts/scaffold.mjs` for infra-only (theme + configs + push + deploy).
_optional: repo (skips push if absent), siteName, tagline, description
_env_optional: OPENAI_API_KEY      — only used by the MONTHLY cron post-deploy. Not used at scaffold time.
GITHUB_TOKEN        — enables auto-push. Without it scaffold runs locally, you push later.
CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN — enables auto-deploy to Cloudflare Workers.
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY   — optional. Set as repo secret only if you have downstream tooling that needs it.
_link_policy: Hard-capped: 3 anchors on home (cards 1/4/7) + 1 link in first paragraph of each of the 5 money articles = 8 outbound money links across 6 pages. Every other article: 0 outbound brand links. Enforced at render time by lib/internal-links.ts.
_uniqueness: lib/uniqueness.ts deterministically picks per-site: menu preset (5 layouts), layout preset (sidebar L/R/none, home order, columns), emoji style (5 visual treatments), WordPress fingerprint (6 themes × 5 versions × random plugin set), CSS prefix. Seed = domain.
_monthly_post: scaffold.mjs picks a random day-of-month (1..28) deterministically from the domain seed. The monthly-post.yml workflow runs daily and only fires on that day. Different sites post on different days.
